name: default
description: Generic reel: N independent keyframes of one continuous scene, smooth morph transitions.
image_style_preamble: Photorealistic, vertical 9:16 composition, cinematic natural lighting, one consistent visual style across all frames (same palette, same lens, same mood).
script_structure: Hook in first 3s, one beat per frame, punchline or CTA at the end. ~2.2 words/sec.
transition_prompt_template: Seamless continuous timelapse in one single uninterrupted shot: {WHAT_CHANGES}, evenly paced across the entire clip. No scene cuts, no flashes, no sudden jumps. Camera perfectly static, identical framing throughout. Constant natural lighting. No people.
